name: clawguard
description: Transparent API proxy and firewall for AI spending — budget caps, anomaly detection, loop prevention

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/commands/init.ts src/commands/start.ts src/commands/status.ts src/commands/freeze.ts src/commands/proxy.ts --format esm --target esnext --outDir dist --no-splitting --banner.js '#!/usr/bin/env node' && cp -r ../proxy/dist ./dist/proxy-runtime
